best_review_details.text: Outstanding Decorator and very professional indeed. Brian is more than a "Good Decorator" and throughout a pleasure to deal with. He is extremely neat and very tidy completing the job in timescale given which was so helpful. The quality and finish of his painting and papering superb and he diligently worked away completing 3 rooms to my complete satisfaction. The rooms look so much fresher now hav
best_review_details.author: Linda

best_review_details.text:
Brian has just finished painting my  house to include the hall and staircase, living room/dining room and kitchen. He did a fantastic job and is a first class decorator. Brian is very reliable, spotlessly clean worker and is competitively priced.
I have engaged the services of many decorators over the years and Brian in my opinion is by far the best.
I would not hesitate to recommend him .
best_review_details.author: Helena

best_review_details.text: Brian and Chris done an amazing job on my living room and Hallway. Really transformed the place. Brian was efficient with communication start to finish. Once dry the paint on a small area had dried patchy. One message to Brian and he was out within the hour to sort it. Would highly recommend and will use them again in the future.
best_review_details.author: Jodie
